# harness_fme_traffic_type (Data Source)

Look up a Harness FME (Split) traffic type by name. The workspace is resolved from `org_id` and `project_id` via Workspaces.ResolveWorkspaceID.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Default Split workspaces include a "user" traffic type.
data "harness_fme_traffic_type" "user" {
  org_id     = "organization_id"
  project_id = "project_id"
  name       = "user"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Traffic type name in Split (e.g. `user`).
- `org_id` (String) Harness organization identifier.
- `project_id` (String) Harness project identifier.

### Read-Only

- `display_attribute_id` (String) Display attribute ID when set.
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `traffic_type_id` (String) The Split traffic type ID (same as `id`).
